label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out with whom Bob is dancing at the end of the dance. The question involves tracking partner swaps among several dancers. Let me jot down the initial pairings and then follow each swap step by step. Initial pairings: - Alice is dancing with Lola. - Bob is dancing with Karl. - Claire is dancing with Patrick. - Dave is dancing with Sam. - Eve is dancing with Helga. Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let's go through each one carefully. First swap: Dave and Alice switch partners. So Dave was with Sam, and Alice was with Lola. After swapping, Dave will be with Lola, and Alice will be with Sam. So after first swap: - Alice is dancing with Sam. - Dave is dancing with Lola. Others remain the same: - Bob is dancing with Karl. - Claire is dancing with Patrick.
